title: Flip String to Monotone Increasing
hints: Consider the split point where all characters to the left are '0' and all to the right are '1'.
Track the number of '1's seen so far and the number of '0's remaining to decide the cost at each split.
The answer is the minimum over all split points of (flips to make left all '0's) + (flips to make right all '1's).
